dl_nr_arfcn.title: Expert: DL NR ARFCN
dl_nr_arfcn.description: Can be used instead of DL Frequency to directly set the Downlink NR Absolute Radio Frequency Channel Number of the cell (Do not set both DL Frequency and DL NR ARFCN)

amarisoft_ssb_computation.title: Expert: Enable Amarisoft SSB Computation
amarisoft_ssb_computation.description: Export only. Enable this to let Amarisoft generate SSB NR ARFCN instead of Simpleran. Warning: enabling this will prevent SSB NR ARFCN to be correctely displayed in the connection parameters, you will need to check gNB log to know the value Amarisoft computed.
